videoSnippet.title: Ding Returns, Magnus Returns! Long Live Classical Chess!
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Ding, Liren (2734) - Meng, Yihan (2483)
https://lichess.org/broadcast/2026-chinese-team-chess-championship--men/round-4/ckHe1Ft4/4fZjIgmH) [4.5] D33 2026.04.22
D33 Queen's Gambit Declined, Tarrasch, Prague variation

1.c4 e6 2.Nc3 d5 3.d4 c5 4.cxd5 exd5 5.Nf3 Nc6 6.g3 Nf6 7.Bg2 cxd4 8.Nxd4 Bc5 9.Nb3 Bb6 10.Na4 O-O 11.Nxb6 axb6 12.Nd4 Re8 13.b3 Bg4 14.f3 Bd7 15.e3 h5 16.O-O h4 17.g4 Nh7 18.h3 Qf6 19.Bb2 Qh6 20.Nc2 Qg6 21.Qd2 Rad8 22.Nd4 Ng5 23.Rad1 Bc8 24.Ne2 Ne6 25.b4 f5 26.a3 Qh6 27.f4 fxg4 28.hxg4 Nc7 29.Bf3 Bxg4 30.Bxg4 Qg6 31.Kh2 Qxg4 32.Rg1 Qf3 33.Rxg7+ Kf8 34.Nd4 Nxd4 35.Qxd4 Rd6 36.Rdg1 h3 37.Rf7+ Kxf7 38.Qg7+ Ke6 39.Rg6+

0:01 Hello Everyone!
02:30 Game Starts
04:45 Completely New Game!
11:15 Pause the Video!
11:50 It Was in This Position!
12:55 Legends Of The Channel

judgment.name: Blunder
judgment.comment: Checkmate is now unavoidable. Rc6 was best.
